items.title: Inside Solana’s upgrade – Lower fees, mainnet debut & what’s next for SOL
items.whyYouShouldCare: The recent Solana upgrade aims to enhance user experience with lower fees, potentially increasing network activity and attracting more developers to the ecosystem.

items.title: Crypto market’s weekly winners and losers – TAO, HYPE, PI, NIGHT
items.whyYouShouldCare: Tracking weekly crypto performance highlights market trends, which can influence investor sentiment and liquidity dynamics within the Solana ecosystem.

items.title: Aave and CoW Swap publish dueling post-mortems after $50 million DeFi swap disaster
items.whyYouShouldCare: The aftermath of the $50 million DeFi incident raises concerns about security in decentralized finance, impacting user trust and engagement across platforms, including Solana.
